metadata.name: ball_sort
metadata.description: Ball Sort — Anchor Auth + VRF + Tournament Program

accounts.name: vrf_program_identity
docs: VRF program identity PDA — proves the callback is from the VRF program

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized signer — not the player wallet or a valid session key

errors.name: SessionExpired
errors.msg: Session key has expired

errors.name: NotGameAuthority
errors.msg: Only the game authority can call this

errors.name: NotTournamentAuthority
errors.msg: Only the tournament authority can call this

errors.name: UnauthorizedVrfCaller
errors.msg: Unauthorized VRF caller — not the whitelisted VRF authority

errors.name: GamePaused
errors.msg: Game is currently paused

errors.name: PuzzleAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Player already has an active puzzle

errors.name: InvalidPuzzleStatus
errors.msg: Puzzle is not in the expected status

errors.name: BoardNotReady
errors.msg: Board not ready yet — wait for VRF callback

errors.name: PuzzleNotStarted
errors.msg: Puzzle not started — call start_puzzle first

errors.name: NoPuzzleActive
errors.msg: No active puzzle — start one first

errors.name: PuzzleNotSolved
errors.msg: Puzzle is not solved — cannot finalize

errors.name: InvalidDifficulty
errors.msg: Invalid difficulty level (must be 0, 1, or 2)

errors.name: InvalidGameMode
errors.msg: Invalid game mode

errors.name: DelegationFailed
errors.msg: Delegation to Ephemeral Rollup failed

errors.name: UndelegationFailed
errors.msg: Undelegation / commit to L1 failed

errors.name: PermissionSetupFailed
errors.msg: Failed to create Private ER permission account

errors.name: PermissionRemovalFailed
errors.msg: Failed to remove Private ER permission

errors.name: NoActiveSession
errors.msg: No active session key to close

errors.name: TournamentNotOpen
errors.msg: Tournament is not open

errors.name: TournamentStillActive
errors.msg: Tournament window has not expired yet

errors.name: TournamentNotClosed
errors.msg: Tournament is not closed yet

errors.name: AlreadyPlayed
errors.msg: Player has already played in this tournament

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Player has already claimed

errors.name: NotCompleter
errors.msg: Only completers can claim prize — DNF players use claim_refund

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Treasury fee exceeds maximum of 2000 bps (20%)

errors.name: InvalidSessionDuration
errors.msg: Session duration out of allowed range (60s - 3600s)
